title: Fix leaking files in Ginkgo
body: We opened a c/storage Store and never closed it

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit a3d2ce1 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan a3d2ce1677ce74146245b0d8bc3149afbb0e4a20 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

Hi @mheon applied your patch in my test tree and test it with following steps but seems it can not resolve the problem:
1. run podman push tests(have 8 cases as in pullreq 566):
 ginkgo -v --focus="podman push"  test/e2e/.
2. in another console us lsof to check the open files:
for i in `seq 10000`; do lsof |grep e2e |grep deleted | wc -l; sleep 3; done

The output shows that the deleted files are still increase:
0 28 56 56 56 56 56 56  56  56  56  56  56  56  84  84  84  84  84  84  84  84  84  84  84  84  112  140  140  168  196  196  0
